title: Viseu, Centro — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Viseu, Centro: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Viseu is a city in Centro with a population of 68,474. A charming city in central Portugal with a well-preserved historic center, Grão Vasco Museum, and excellent Dão wine region.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
